  "findings": [
    "Unsealed weatherhead penetration allowing potential water ingress into the service raceway and electrical equipment."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Seal the service entrance raceway where it enters the building or weatherhead using an approved sealing compound (duct seal) to prevent moisture from entering."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 230.56 and 230.23/230.24 require service-entrance conductors and raceways to be raintight and sealed. An unsealed weatherhead or service penetration allows water to enter the service enclosure, creating a severe shock and fire hazard.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 230.56",
    "NEC Article 230.23",
    "NEC Article 230.24"
  ]
